arts.sum: Lazio face several injury concerns as they prepare to host Atalanta in Serie A. Manager Marco Baroni will be without midfielder Matias Vecino and forwards Pedro and Tijjani Noslin due to various injuries. Centre-back Alessio Romagnoli is also doubtful with a knee issue. arts.ttl: Isaksen: “We know we can beat Atalanta. I dream of winning the Scudetto with Lazio”
arts.sum: Lazio winger Gustav Isaksen spoke to the club's official channels ahead of their crucial match against Atalanta. He expressed confidence in his team's ability to secure a victory, stating, "We are facing another great match. It won't be easy for either of us, but we know our worth at home and will do everything we can to earn the three points." The post Isaksen: “We know we can beat Atalanta. arts.ttl: Lazio vs. Atalanta, big game at the Olimpico
arts.sum: Atalanta have won 38 of their 112 Serie A matches against Lazio (D42 L32), a joint-record for them against a single opponent in the competition (also 38 wins against Bologna). The last eight matches between Lazio and Atalanta in Serie A have been very balanced: three wins for each side and two draws; the Nerazzurri won the most recent one (3-1 on 4th February 2024 at the Gewiss Stadium).
